narrative: PRL printed its sharpest drawdown since tracking began — volume-weighted price -18.44% to $0.6175 on $65.5k of cross-venue volume across six pairs — while bridge flow blew past yesterday's record: custody +35,468 PRL to 545,277 (+7.0%) and minted WPRL +31,587 to 537,225 (+6.3%). The two trends together (PRL → WPRL surge during a price crash) read as sellers routing native PRL onto Ethereum spot to exit. Surplus widened to 1.50% (8,053 PRL) as deposits again outran mint settlement, supply/custody re-aligned this morning. Network hashrate gave back -29% to 25.15 EH/s after yesterday's ATH (the difficulty retarget to 0x18011f76 priced the surge in) while MinePRL pool stayed flat at 21 GPUs — meaning non-pool capacity is what came and went. Code velocity cooled hard: 24 commits/7d combined (vs 80 last week) as the rolling window shed the RC5.33–RC5.35 cycle; pearl-research-labs/pearl crossed 200 stars.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Price -18.44% in 24h on $65.5k volume — sharpest 24h drawdown since tracking began (2026-05-26).

Bridge custody +35,468 PRL to 545,277 — new 24h inbound record (broke yesterday's 22,436); minted WPRL +31,587 to 537,225. PRL → WPRL surge during a price crash reads as sellers routing PRL onto Ethereum spot to exit.
Surplus widened 1.14% → 1.50% (8,053 PRL) as deposits outpaced mint settlement for the second straight day.
Network hashrate -29% to 25.15 EH/s — yesterday's ATH retracted as difficulty retargeted to 0x18011f76. MinePRL pool flat at 21 GPUs, so the capacity churn happened outside the pool.

social.summary: No coordinated panic chatter despite the -18% day; @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz feeds quiet through the move, no incident reports. Quiet attention on the core repo continued — pearl-research-labs/pearl crossed 200 stars, the third straight day of steady star inflow.

github.last_commit_msg: ux(RC5.36): hide slow-lane explainer when fast-lane has plenty of room
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
